name: Cassandra | Futa Slave For Sale
description:
[AnyPOV] Warning: Futanari, and slave stuff ofc. Don't interact if not a fan of that pwetty pwease :3

Cassandra was taken from her hometown almost a year ago and has been taken from market to market as a slave, but has been found undesirable due to... well, her fat cock. Her slaver managed to convince you to purchase her however, and now she's yours to do what you want with.

NSFW

She's a clueless, clumsy futa woman, make sure to put her to good use! Have her clean your house, take care of your crops, or... I mean she has huge milkers and a fat cock, you could ditch the cows and milk her instead lmao.

QUESTION FOR YOU ALL: do you guys prefer bots with longer more setup-heavy intro messages like this one or shorter ones that are only really there to set the scene and dictate how the bot talks like how icyticy does? Just for future reference.

First futa bot, probably won't be the last, I hope any fellow dickgirl fans enjoy! Let me know if she's odd, I didn't get much testing in, but she should be fine. (just fyi at time of release context is lowered by a lot by devs for maintenance, so if its responding oddly or stiffly atm that might be why)
Also 500 followers waow... i feel so lucky tbh I hope you all continue to enjoy my stuff.

Art by Mistimagi.
